# wracs

# Package index

## All functions

- [`add_covariates()`](https://cfia-pdam.github.io/wracs/reference/add_covariates.md)
  **\[experimental\]** : Add climate data covariates
- [`add_quality_control_flags()`](https://cfia-pdam.github.io/wracs/reference/add_quality_control_flags.md)
  **\[experimental\]** : Add quality control flags to each GBIF
  occurrence record
- [`bryonia_alba`](https://cfia-pdam.github.io/wracs/reference/bryonia_alba.md)
  : GBIF occurrence data for Bryonia alba
